habitat: Southern China and SE Asia; common “cinnamon” in many markets.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary bark spice; traditional Chinese medicinal bark (rou gui) in formulas.
traditionalUsesDe: Rinden-Gewürz; traditionelle chinesische Arzneirinde (Rougui) in Formeln.
preparation: Bark sticks/powder in food; decoctions in TCM under guidance.
cautions: Higher coumarin than Ceylon cinnamon—limit chronic high intake. Label species when possible.
historicalNotes: Dominant commercial cinnamon type outside specialty Ceylon trade.
habitatDe: Southern China und SE Asien; common “cinnamon” in many markets.
preparationDe: Bark sticks/powder in food; Abkochungs in TCM under Anleitung.
cautionsDe: Higher coumarin than Ceylon cinnamon—limit chronic high intake. Label species when möglich.
historicalNotesDe: Dominant commercial cinnamon type outside specialty Ceylon trade.
